---
title: "Totally RAD!: Learning Trajectory for Reasoning About Distributions"
description: "MCTM 2026"
date: "2026-04-24"
---

![](images/mctm-distributions.png){width="382"}


<br />

## Session Description

Participants will experience activities designed to grow students’ understanding and reasoning about distributions. You will leave with ideas and resources to help you implement the revised MN standards.

<br />

## Slides
```{=html}
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vSvYEKnyeNbi55VyksApQVONxwDKldlBnN7PaI4WIWsmiQbQeOkWtzEFYtfJNBpLJ_wh8qSdsqIccbm/pubembed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="720" height="426.753" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```

[Download slides here](files/mctm26-distributions/distributions.pdf) <br />

<br />

## Links to Activities
[Sticky Note Activity](files/mctm26-distributions/sticky-note-activity.pdf)

[Sorting Histograms Activity](files/mctm26-distributions/sorting-activity.pdf)

[Matching Histograms](files/mctm26-distributions/guess-activity.pdf)

[Comparing Distributions](files/mctm26-distributions/comparing-activity.pdf)

[Master Key](files/mctm26-distributions/distributions-activities-key.pdf)
